name: Dark Rose Fairy
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>闇薔薇の妖精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ダークローズフェアリー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a Tuner(s) is Special Summoned (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 card from your hand or field to the GY; place this card on the top or bottom of your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Dark Rose Fairy" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a Tuner(s) is Special Summoned (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 card from your hand or field to the GY; place this card on the top or bottom of your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Dark Rose Fairy" once per turn.
eff: If a Tuner(s) is Special Summoned (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 card from your hand or field to the GY; place this card on the top or bottom of your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Dark Rose Fairy" once per turn.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Sisters of the Rose

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Returns itself from Graveyard to Deck
